prompt:
Unique, collectible NFT character in bold cartoon style. 
Background: Vertical hologram of city culture rising behind. 
Head: Head stylized as a can with nozzle top, minor dents. 
Eyes: Slightly narrowed eyes with attitude. 
Clothing: Reinforced jacket with thunderhead patterns and static detailing. 
Color: Gloss black with deep reflectivity. 
Species: Gold Hybrid. 
Only visible text: 'VERT'. 
Bold outlines, cel-shading, flat colors, no gradients, no photorealism.
